name: codex-wallpaper-plugin
description: Apply a local JPG, PNG, or WebP wallpaper to Codex Desktop with readable glass-style chat surfaces.

interface.shortDescription: Use local images as Codex Desktop wallpaper.
interface.longDescription: A Windows-focused Codex plugin and helper scripts for applying a local JPG, PNG, or WebP image as the Codex Desktop chat background through Chrome DevTools Protocol CSS injection. It keeps text readable with blurred glass surfaces and avoids modifying app.asar.
defaultPrompt: Apply a local wallpaper to Codex Desktop.
Make my Codex wallpaper more readable.
Restore the default Codex wallpaper style.
